children.name: hwEntitySystemServiceType
children.description: This object indicates the system service type.

children.name: hwDevicePowerInfoUsedPower
children.description: This object indicates the current power of the device.

children.name: hwPnpOperateTable
children.description: This table describes the hardware functions. Using this table, you can obtain the specified 'hardware description file' or 'hardware capability file'.

children.name: hwEntityPhysicalSpecPowerframe
children.description: The power frame coefficient used for calculating the index of the physical entity.

children.name: hwLithiumBatteryGroupTable
children.description: This table describes information about lithium battery groups.

children.name: hwIfBandRateTable
children.description: This table lists the info of download diagnostics. You can read the info of the download diagnostics on the device.

children.name: hwApInfoTable
children.description: This table describes virtual-access AP device information.

children.name: hwStorageEntTable
children.description: This table describes CF card information about the local chassis.

children.name: hwDownloadDiagnosticsTable
children.description: This table lists the info of download diagnostics. You can read the info of the download diagnostics on the device.

children.name: hwBoardDcOutputStateTable
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwBatteryInfoTable
children.description: Description.Battery information table

children.name: hwBatteryInfoEntry
children.description: Description.Battery information entry

children.name: hwEntityNPStateTable
children.description: A table of information that displays the forward performance usage       of entity .

children.name: hwMonitorInputTable
children.description:
This table contains one row per replaceable unit physical entity.
                This table is used to set the status of monitor port.

children.name: hwDeviceServiceType
children.description: It describes the service-type of the device. bit0 is WLAN, bit1 is SSLVPN, bit2 is ipsec,other bits temporarily without easy back extension. Each bit 0 is disable, 1 is enable.

children.name: hwHardDiskStateTable
children.description: This table lists the status of hard disks. You can read the status of the hard disks on the device.

children.name: hwDacsStatusTable
children.description: This table lists the status of DACS. You can read the status of the DACS on the device.

children.name: hwTemperatureThresholdTable
children.description: This table describes Huawei device temperature objects.

children.name: hwFanStatusTable
children.description: This table describes fan information on a device.

children.name: hwEntityMemUsageHistoryTable
children.description: This table lists the MemUsageHistory.

children.name: hwEntPowerUsedInfoTable
children.description: A table of information that displays the power use of entity .

children.name: hwEntPowerUsedInfoEntry
children.description: Entry of the table of information that displays the power use of entity.

children.name: hwEntPowerUsedInfoBoardSlot
children.description: Board's slot number.

children.name: hwPortBip8StatisticsTable
children.description: This table describes port BIP8 statistics.

children.name: hwIntegratedPowerSystemTable
children.description: This table describes information about the integrated power supply system.

children.name: hwIntegratedPowerSystemEntry
children.description: This entry describes information about the integrated power supply system.

children.name: hwIntegratedPowerSoftwareVersionASCII
children.description: This object indicates the software version (ASCII).

children.name: hwLedTimeRangeName
children.description: Led off time range name, if Led Off Time Range config enabled.

children.name: hwUploadDiagnosticsTable
children.description: This table lists the info of upload diagnostics. You can read the info of the upload diagnostics on the device.

children.name: hwBoardAcOutputStateTable
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwBoardAcOutputStateEntry
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwEntityCpuUsageHistoryTable
children.description: This table lists the CPU usage history.

children.name: hwEntityCpuUsageHistoryEntry
children.description: Defines an entry in the hwEntityCpuUsageHistoryTable.

children.name: hwLithiumBatteryTable
children.description: This table describes information about a single lithium battery.

children.name: hwRUModuleInfoTable
children.description: This table describes production information, including the BOM ID, BOM, local description, manufacturing code, and update log. The MIB information is stored in the EEPROM of the physical entity.

children.name: hwBoardDcOutputInfoTable
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwBoardDcOutputInfoEntry
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwBoardDcOutputVoltage
children.description: This object indicates the device dc-output voltage. Unit: V

children.name: hwPreDisposeSequenceNo
children.description: This object indicates the sequence number of the 'predispose capability file'.The value consists of the file version number and CRC code.
